message:
beads: close masked_values (u5rz) and masked_not_equal (wt6u) wrappers

Reflect completion of two numpy.ma python wrapper parity tasks whose
implementations landed in 27593ad (masked_values) and d3a92c5
(masked_not_equal). Both beads transition from in_progress to closed
with matching close_reason entries pointing at the implementation
commits for traceability.
